og.title: Just an Advisory Lyrics - The Unseen Chorus Musical
og.description: Opening advisory track from The Unseen Chorus addressing addiction, shadows, and offering support through SA.org.

twitter.title: Just an Advisory Lyrics - The Unseen Chorus
twitter.description: Opening track from The Unseen Chorus (A Gay Musical). 'You're not alone, help is always here.'

essay: "Just an Advisory" opens The Unseen Chorus with a compassionate content warning. This spoken-word introduction acknowledges the difficult themes explored in the musical—addiction, infidelity, mental health struggles—while offering immediate support resources.

By referencing SA.org (Sex Addicts Anonymous), the song sets a tone of honesty and care, inviting the audience to step into challenging subject matter with support available. It's an invitation: "Together."
song.lyricsHtml:
Ladies and gentlemen, before we start our tale
A gentle note so the story can set sail
Tonight we walk through shadows, secrets and desire
But some may find these leans cut close or burn like fire

If you feel the echo stir too near
Please know you're not alone, help is always here
One place to turn if you need a hand is SA.org
They'll help you stand with voices that listen and hearts that care

You'll find your story and hope is there
Now, let's step into the show
Together
